result: Data cleaning completed successfully. The R script loaded all 6 survey datasets from data/input/, merged them using full_join by NSID, and created harmonized education aim variables for ages 17, 19, 20, 25, and 32. All variables use the same 6-category coding scheme (0=NVQ 4-5, 1=NVQ 1-3, 2=None/entry level, 3=Other, 4=None of these, 5=Not studying) plus standard missing value codes (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -3=Not asked, -2=Schedule not applicable, -1=Item not applicable). The cleaned dataset with 16,111 rows and 6 columns (NSID, educaim17, educaim19, educaim20, educaim25, educaim32) has been written to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
